title: onosma tricerosperma subsp. mauretanica
intro: Onosma tricerosperma subsp. mauretanica is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a type of glaucous, perennial herb. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Onosma tricerosperma subsp. mauretanica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and inflammation, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and other medicinal remedies.
